headline: Expedia announces new partnership with PredictHQ
summary: Expedia (EXPE) Group announced a new partnership with PredictHQ. The company said the integration gives lodging partners a clearer view of rising travel demand by combining PredictHQ’s forward-looking demand forecasts with Expedia Group’s rich traveler insights, empowering them to identify, anticipate, and act on demand shifts with greater confidence. headline: Mizuho Maintains Neutral on Expedia Group, Lowers Price Target to $245
